creator: pyunyh@gmail.com
text:
On Sat, Mar 27, 2010 at 10:07:42PM +0100, Sebastian Tymk?w wrote:
> Thank you for your help.
> I checked posts and patched my sources.
> Now I may confirm that patch works.
> I wonder when it'll be on release or stable.
> 

8.1-RELEASE and 7.4-RELEASE will include the change.
Thanks for testing and confirmation!

> Best regards,
> 
> Sebastian Tymk?w
> 
> 2010/3/26 Pyun YongHyeon <pyunyh@gmail.com>
> 
> > On Fri, Mar 26, 2010 at 12:44:14PM +0100, Sebastian Tymk?w wrote:
> > > Hi,
> > >
> > > I've tried again and got the same messages about No PHY.
> > > Can you contact me with anyone who has HS22 ?
> >
> > Check the kern/140970.
> > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=140970
> > And see Tuareg's post in the PR.
> >
> > > Maybe my kernel is wrong and thats why it doesn't work for me.
> > > I attache pcmci -lcbv.
> > >
> > > Best regards,
> > >
> > > Sebastian Tymk?w
> > >
> > > 2010/3/24 Pyun YongHyeon <pyunyh@gmail.com>
> > >
> > > > On Tue, Mar 23, 2010 at 08:18:19AM +0100, Sebastian Tymk?w wrote:
> > > > > 2010/3/22 Pyun YongHyeon <pyunyh@gmail.com>
> > > > >
> > > > > > On Mon, Mar 22, 2010 at 11:57:19AM +0100, Sebastian Tymk?w wrote:
> > > > > > > Hi,
> > > > > > >
> > > > > > > Patch doesn't work.
> > > > > > > I created new ISO (FreeBSD 8.0)  with patched driver but it
> > didn't
> > > > work.
> > > > > > >
> > > > > >
> > > > > > Are you sure you patched both bce(4) and brgphy(4)? I have a couple
> > > > > > of success reports on stable/8. For example, read the following
> > > > > > thread and see Hugo's reply.
> > > > > >
> > http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-net/2010-March/024753.html
> > > > > >
> > > > > > Thank you for reply.
> > > > > I checked it twice. Both times I cvsup all sources,made world/kernel
> >  and
> > > > > made own ISO.
> > > > > In both cases I couldn't start bce driver.
> > > > > Link which you have sent is for PowerEdge m610 not for IBM HS22.
> > > > > I'll try again and see whats happen on 8.0 and 7.2.
> > > > >
> > > >
> > > > No, that machine also has the same controller. I also have success
> > > > reports on HS22 from olli@ According the olli@ HS22 has two kind of
> > > > controllers that are served by bge(4) and bce(4).
> > > > r202293 and r202294 fix the bge(4) issue such that BCM5715S on HS22
> > > > should work. For bce(4) controller on HS22 about mentioned patch
> > > > should work. You said you have bce(4) issue on HS22 but I have
> > > > success reports on HS22, this puzzles me a lot. :-(
> > > >
> >
> >
> >
